result:
I’d choose to make it so everyone reliably has enough: enough food, clean water, shelter, healthcare, safety, and a fair chance at education.

A lot of the world’s suffering grows out of scarcity and instability. If those basics were guaranteed, people would have more freedom to build, create, connect, and solve bigger problems together.

Not because it would make the world perfect—but because it would give more people the foundation to live with dignity.

What about you?
prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
